title: Teltonika RUTM52 Dual 5G Router
description: The RUTM52 is a future-proof 5G router designed for mission-critical applications, featuring dual 5G modems, multi-WAN capabilities, and 4G LTE Cat 20 fallback . With dual SIM slots, eSIM support , and compatibility with SA and NSA 5G architectures, it ensures high-speed, uninterrupted connectivity today and years ahead. Load balancing, Wi-Fi 5, and five Gigabit Ethernet ports enhance performance, while RutOS with industrial protocols and various VPNs make it versatile for complex setups.… DUAL 5G MODEM: Up to double cellular speeds and always-on connection DUAL SIM & eSIMâ¢: With auto failover, backup WAN and other switching scenarios SA & NSA: Supports both architectures to leverage the 5G infrastructure FUTURE-PROOFING: Backward compatible with 4G (LTE Cat 20) Device 18 W PSU 8 x 5G Mobile antennas (magnetic mount, SMA male) 2 x Wi-Fi antennas (magnetic mount, RP-SMA male, 1.5 m cable) 1 x GNSS antenna (adhesive, SMA male, 3 m cable) Ethernet cable (1.5 m) SIM Adapter kit QSG (Quick Start Guide) Packaging box
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band), LTE, 3G (GSM), 4G (GSM), 5G (GSM) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g, 802.11ac - wave2 Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Detachable Detachable antennas 11 Integrated 4G/LTE radio part Yes 4G/LTE bands support (1) 2100 MHz, (3) 1800 MHz, (7) 2600 MHz, (8) 900 MHz, (20) 800 MHz, (5) 850 MHz, (28) 700 MHz,… Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 1 WAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps RF connectors (2) RSMA female, (1) SMA female, (8) SMA female LAN speed (4) 10/100/1000Mbps SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 2 GPS modul Yes Power Power over Ethernet 9 .. 50V DC Power type DC connector, PoE Max. power consumption [W] 13 Power via connector/terminal 9 .. 50V DC Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Desktop, DIN rail Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 560 Width [mm] 132 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 95 Hardware CPU MediaTek, Dual-Core, 880 MHz, MIPS1004Kc CPU frequency [MHz] 880 Internal storage [MB] 256 RAM [MB] 256
